titleZh: 中国公司法修订：外国投资者需在7月1日前关注的要点
titleEn: 2024 Company Law Changes in China: What Foreign Investors Need to Know Before July 1
abstractZh: 梳理新《公司法》的关键过渡条款与落地要点，为外商投资企业在7月1日生效窗口期内进行公司治理和资本安排调整提供参考。
abstractEn: Identifies practical milestones for foreign investors before the July 1 implementation date, with focus on capital, governance and rights-adjustment issues.
